```{r warning = FALSE, include = FALSE}
    RR = mean_yield / ref_biomass,
    lnyield = log(mean_yield + 1e-6)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(RR), is.finite(RR))

  
rr_yield[sapply(rr_yield, is.infinite)] <- NA
rr_yield <- na.omit(rr_yield)


rr_yield$RR <- as.numeric(rr_yield$RR)
rr_yield <- as.data.frame(rr_yield)

rr_yield$lnyield <- log(rr_yield$mean_yield + 0.000001) 

str(rr_yield)

```


Density at harvest

```{r warning = FALSE}
cchitnh <- subset(cchit, herb.trmt == "Weedy") # subset out herbicide treated
cchitnh <- cchitnh %>%
  dplyr::mutate(across(c(sy, plotID, term.trmt, herb.trmt), as.factor))

group_means <- cchitnh %>%
  dplyr::group_by(state, year, sy, term.trmt, plotID, DPP, ccbm_mg) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    mean_biomass = mean(densityh, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) 

ref <- group_means %>%
  dplyr::filter(term.trmt == "No cover") %>%
  dplyr::rename(ref_biomass = mean_biomass) %>%
   dplyr :: select(sy, plotID, ref_biomass)

group_means <- group_means %>%
  dplyr::mutate(block = substr(plotID, 2, 3))  
ref <- ref %>%
  dplyr::mutate(block = substr(plotID, 2, 3))

rr_data <- group_means %>%
  dplyr::left_join(ref, by = "sy", suffix = c("", "_ref")) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(ref_biomass), !is.na(mean_biomass)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(RR = mean_biomass / ref_biomass) %>%
  dplyr::select(-plotID_ref, -block_ref) 

rr_data[sapply(rr_data, is.infinite)] <- NA
rr_data <- na.omit(rr_data)


rr_data$RR <- as.numeric(rr_data$RR)
rr_data <- as.data.frame(rr_data)
str(rr_data)

rr_data$lnrr <- log(rr_data$RR + 0.000001) 
```



Making a new dataset with all combined

```{r}
#rr_yield <- rr_yield %>%
 #rename(lnyield = lnrr)

#rr_density <- rr_density %>%
 # rename(lnRR_4WAP = lnRR)

rr_data <- rr_data %>%
  dplyr::rename(lnRR_harvest = lnrr)

rr_yield <- rr_yield %>%
  dplyr::mutate(across(c(sy, plotID, block), as.character))

#rr_density <- rr_density %>%
 # mutate(across(c(sy, plotID, block), as.character))

rr_data <- rr_data %>%
  dplyr::mutate(across(c(sy, plotID, block), as.character))

rr_density_mean <- rr_density %>%
  dplyr::group_by(sy, block, DPP, ccbm_mg) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(lnRR_4WAP = mean(lnRR_4WAP, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

rr_yield_mean <- rr_yield %>%
  dplyr::group_by(sy, block, DPP, ccbm_mg) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(lnyield = mean(lnyield, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

final_datay <- rr_data %>%
  left_join(rr_density_mean, by = c("sy", "block", "DPP", "ccbm_mg"))
final_datay <- final_datay %>%
  left_join(rr_yield_mean, by = c("sy", "block", "DPP", "ccbm_mg"))

str(final_datay)
```




END OF SEASON WEEDS

### Model 9
```{r}
final_datay$ccbm_sc <- as.numeric(scale(final_datay$ccbm_mg))
final_datay$DPP_sc  <- as.numeric(scale(final_datay$DPP))
```

```{r}
mod1 <- lmer(ccbm_sc ~ DPP_sc + (DPP_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit)
```

## Model 10
```{r}
mod2 <- lmer(lnRR_4WAP ~ ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit)
```

## Model 11 (lnrr harvest ~ lnrr mid)

```{r}
mod5a <- lmer(lnRR_harvest ~ lnRR_4WAP + ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc || sy), data = final_datay)
```

## Model 11.5 (lnrr harvest ~ ccbm)

Per previous suggestions not doing both weed density timings 

```{r}
mod11_5 <- lmer(lnRR_harvest ~ ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc || sy), data = final_datay)
mod11_5a <- lmer(lnRR_harvest ~ ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay)
anova(mod11_5, mod11_5a) # correlated is way better!
summary(mod11_5a)
anova(mod11_5a)
```

## Model 11.75 (lnRR_4WAP ~ ccbm)

Per previous suggestions not doing both weed density timings 

```{r}
mod11_75 <- lmer(lnRR_4WAP ~ ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc || sy), data = final_datay)
mod11_75a <- lmer(lnRR_4WAP ~ ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay)
anova(mod11_75, mod11_75a) # correlated is way better!
summary(mod11_75a)
anova(mod11_75a)
```




## Model 12.5 (soybean yield ~ lnrr end)

```{r}
mod9a <- lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_harvest + lnRR_4WAP + ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay)
anova(mod9a) #biggest p value is 4wap
mod9b <- lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_harvest +  ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay)
mod9c <- lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_harvest +  ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc || sy), data = final_datay)

anova(mod9b, mod9c)
```

P-value >0.05 as such, best model is the most parsimonious.


```{r   fig.width = 5, fig.height = 5}
residuals <- resid(mod9c)
hist(residuals, breaks = 20, main = "Histogram of Residuals")
ggplot(data.frame(eta = predict(mod9c, type="link"), pearson = residuals(mod9c, type = "pearson")),
    aes(x = eta,y = pearson)) +
    geom_point() +
    theme_bw()
qqnorm(residuals)
qqline(residuals, col="red")
infIndexPlot(mod9c, vars = "Cook")
dotplot(ranef(mod9c))
```





## Model 12 (soybean yield ~ lnrr 4wap)

```{r}
mod9a <- lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_4WAP + ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay)
anova(mod9a) #biggest p value is 4wap
mod9b <- lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_4WAP +  ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay)
mod9c <- lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_4WAP +  ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc || sy), data = final_datay)

anova(mod9b, mod9c)
```

P-value >0.05 as such, best model is the most parsimonious.




```{r}
Q1 <- quantile(residuals, 0.25)
Q3 <- quantile(residuals, 0.75)
IQR <- Q3 - Q1
lower_bound <- Q1 - 1.5 * IQR
upper_bound <- Q3 + 1.5 * IQR
outliers <- which(residuals < lower_bound | residuals > upper_bound)

final_datay <- final_datay[-outliers, ]
```

```{r}
mod9c <- lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_4WAP +  ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc || sy), data = final_datay)
residuals <- resid(mod9c)
hist(residuals, breaks = 20, main = "Histogram of Residuals")
ggplot(data.frame(eta = predict(mod9c, type="link"), pearson = residuals(mod9c, type = "pearson")),
    aes(x = eta,y = pearson)) +
    geom_point() +
    theme_bw()
qqnorm(residuals)
qqline(residuals, col="red")
infIndexPlot(mod9c, vars = "Cook")
dotplot(ranef(mod9c))
```




### PSEM

Starting-- most basic, no mid-season density


```{r}
psemDensity2 <- psem(
  lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_harvest + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(lnRR_harvest ~ ccbm_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(ccbm_sc ~ DPP_sc + (DPP_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit)
)

dSep(psemDensity2, .progressBar = FALSE)
# 3 p values v small
fisherC(psemDensity2)
#Fisher's: 94.036	on 6 df, p = 0
summary(psemDensity2)
```



```{r}
psemDensity3 <- psem(
  lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_harvest + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(lnRR_harvest ~ ccbm_sc+ (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(ccbm_sc ~ DPP_sc + (DPP_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit)
)

dSep(psemDensity3, .progressBar = FALSE)
# still small p value
fisherC(psemDensity3)

summary(psemDensity3)
```


```{r}
psemDensity4 <- psem(
  lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_harvest + ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(lnRR_harvest ~ ccbm_sc  + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(ccbm_sc ~ DPP_sc + (DPP_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit)
)

dSep(psemDensity4, .progressBar = FALSE)
# still small p value
fisherC(psemDensity4)

summary(psemDensity4)
```


```{r}
psemDensity5 <- psem(
  lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_harvest + ccbm_sc +  DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc || sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(lnRR_harvest ~ ccbm_sc  + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(ccbm_sc ~ DPP_sc + (DPP_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit)
)

dSep(psemDensity5, .progressBar = FALSE)
# still small p value
fisherC(psemDensity5)

summary(psemDensity5)
```


```{r}
psemDensity6 <- psem(
  lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_harvest + ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc || sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(lnRR_harvest ~ ccbm_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(ccbm_sc ~ DPP_sc + (DPP_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit)
)

dSep(psemDensity6, .progressBar = FALSE)
# saturated
fisherC(psemDensity6)
# saturated
summary(psemDensity6)
```


```{r}
psemDensity6 <- psem(
  lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_harvest + ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc || sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(lnRR_harvest ~ ccbm_sc + DPP_sc+ (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(ccbm_sc ~ DPP_sc + (DPP_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit)
)

dSep(psemDensity6, .progressBar = FALSE)
# saturated
fisherC(psemDensity6)
# saturated
summary(psemDensity6)
```



## PSEM 
Mid season this time ig


```{r}
psemDensity2 <- psem(
  lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_4WAP + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(lnRR_4WAP ~ ccbm_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(ccbm_sc ~ DPP_sc + (DPP_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit)
)

dSep(psemDensity2, .progressBar = FALSE)
# 3 p values v small
fisherC(psemDensity2)
#Fisher's: 74.059	on 6 df, p = 0
summary(psemDensity2)
```



```{r}
psemDensity3 <- psem(
  lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_4WAP + ccbm_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(lnRR_4WAP ~ ccbm_sc+ (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(ccbm_sc ~ DPP_sc + (DPP_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit)
)

dSep(psemDensity3, .progressBar = FALSE)
# still small p value
fisherC(psemDensity3)
# 79.501	 4df p < 0.001
summary(psemDensity3)
```


```{r}
psemDensity4 <- psem(
  lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_4WAP + ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(lnRR_4WAP ~ ccbm_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(ccbm_sc ~ DPP_sc + (DPP_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit)
)

dSep(psemDensity4, .progressBar = FALSE)
# still small p value
fisherC(psemDensity4)
# 7.314 2df p = 0.017
summary(psemDensity4)

basisSet(psemDensity4)
dSep(psemDensity4)
```


```{r}
psemDensity5 <- psem(
  lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_4WAP + ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(lnRR_4WAP ~ ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(ccbm_sc ~ DPP_sc + (DPP_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit)
)

dSep(psemDensity5, .progressBar = FALSE)

fisherC(psemDensity5)

summary(psemDensity5)
```


### Figures

```{r}
mod9b <- lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_4WAP +  ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay)


valid_sy <- unique(mod9c@frame$sy) #just site years in mod2

newdat <- expand.grid(
  ccbm_sc = seq(min(final_datay$ccbm_sc, na.rm = TRUE),
                max(final_datay$ccbm_sc, na.rm = TRUE),
                length.out = 100),
  DPP_sc = mean(final_datay$DPP_sc, na.rm = TRUE),
  lnRR_4WAP = mean(final_datay$lnRR_4WAP, na.rm = TRUE), 
  sy = valid_sy
)
newdat$pred_sy <- predict(mod9b, newdata = newdat, re.form = NULL)

newdat$pred_pop <- predict(mod9b, newdata = newdat, re.form = NA)

pred_int2 <- predictInterval(
  mod9b,
  newdata = newdat,
  level = 0.95, #seems fine
  n.sims = 1000, #runs fast?? good enough
  stat = "mean",
  include.resid.var = FALSE,
  which = "fixed"  # we only want the confidence interval for the population line not the site year lines
)

newdat$fit   <- pred_int2$fit
newdat$lwr   <- pred_int2$lwr
newdat$upr   <- pred_int2$upr

figure5b <- ggplot() +
  # Site-year lines (colored)
  geom_line(data = newdat,
            aes(x = ccbm_sc, y = pred_sy, color = sy),
            size = 0.75, alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_line(data = newdat,
            aes(x = ccbm_sc, y = pred_pop),
            color = "black", size = 1.5) +
  geom_ribbon(data = newdat,
            aes(x = ccbm_sc, ymin = lwr, ymax = upr),
            fill = "gray30", alpha = 0.4) +
  labs(x = "Cover crop biomass",
       y = "Soybean Yield", 
       color = "Site-year") + 
  theme_light () + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#7294D4", "#7294D4",  #delaware
                                "#FAD510", "#FAD510", #illinois
                                "#C52E19",  #louisiana
                                "#046C9A", #maryland
                                "#F3DF6C", #minnesota
                                "#FBA72A", "#FBA72A", #missouri
                                "#CEAB07", "#CEAB07", "#CEAB07",#nebraska
                                
                                "#85D4E3", "#85D4E3", "#85D4E3")) + #virginia
  theme(
       axis.text.x = element_text(size=10), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=10), 
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=10),
       legend.position = "none",
       legend.spacing.x = unit(5, "pt"),
       legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
       legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
       legend.key.size = unit(0.2, "cm"),
       legend.key.spacing.y = unit(0.1, "cm"),
       legend.box.margin = margin(-5, -5, -5, -5))+
  guides(col = guide_legend(nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE, title.position = "top", title.hjust = 0.5))

figure5b

#work out some save details 
ggsave("figure5biomass.png", width = 2.5, height = 2, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```



```{r}
mod9b <- lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_harvest + ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay)


valid_sy <- unique(mod9b@frame$sy) #just site years in mod2

newdat <- expand.grid(
  ccbm_sc = seq(min(final_datay$ccbm_sc, na.rm = TRUE),
                max(final_datay$ccbm_sc, na.rm = TRUE),
                length.out = 100),
  DPP_sc = mean(final_datay$DPP_sc, na.rm = TRUE),
  lnRR_harvest = mean(final_datay$lnRR_harvest, na.rm = TRUE), 
  #lnRR_4WAP = mean(final_datay$lnRR_4WAP, na.rm = TRUE),
  sy = valid_sy
)
newdat$pred_sy <- predict(mod9b, newdata = newdat, re.form = NULL)

newdat$pred_pop <- predict(mod9b, newdata = newdat, re.form = NA)

pred_int2 <- predictInterval(
  mod9b,
  newdata = newdat,
  level = 0.95, #seems fine
  n.sims = 1000, #runs fast?? good enough
  stat = "mean",
  include.resid.var = FALSE,
  which = "fixed"  # we only want the confidence interval for the population line not the site year lines
)

newdat$fit   <- pred_int2$fit
newdat$lwr   <- pred_int2$lwr
newdat$upr   <- pred_int2$upr

figure5b_end <- ggplot() +
  # Site-year lines (colored)
  geom_line(data = newdat,
            aes(x = ccbm_sc, y = pred_sy, color = sy),
            size = 0.75, alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_line(data = newdat,
            aes(x = ccbm_sc, y = pred_pop),
            color = "black", size = 1.5) +
  geom_ribbon(data = newdat,
            aes(x = ccbm_sc, ymin = lwr, ymax = upr),
            fill = "gray30", alpha = 0.4) +
  labs(x = "Cover crop biomass",
       y = "Soybean Yield", 
       color = "Site-year") + 
  theme_light () + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#7294D4", "#7294D4",   #delaware
                                "#FAD510", "#FAD510", #illinois
                                "#C52E19",  #louisiana
                                "#046C9A",  #maryland
                                "#F3DF6C", #minnesota
                                "#FBA72A", "#FBA72A", #missouri
                                "#CEAB07", "#CEAB07", "#CEAB07", #nebraska
                                
                                "#85D4E3", "#85D4E3", "#85D4E3")) + #virginia
  theme(
       axis.text.x = element_text(size=10), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=10), 
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=10),
       legend.position = "none",
       legend.spacing.x = unit(5, "pt"),
       legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
       legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
       legend.key.size = unit(0.2, "cm"),
       legend.key.spacing.y = unit(0.1, "cm"),
       legend.box.margin = margin(-5, -5, -5, -5))+
  guides(col = guide_legend(nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE, title.position = "top", title.hjust = 0.5))

figure5b_end

#work out some save details 
ggsave("figure_endseason.png", width = 2.5, height = 2, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```










MID SEASON WEEDS

### Model 9
```{r}
final_datay$ccbm_sc <- as.numeric(scale(final_datay$ccbm_mg))
final_datay$DPP_sc  <- as.numeric(scale(final_datay$DPP))
```

```{r}
mod1 <- lmer(ccbm_sc ~ DPP_sc + (DPP_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit)
```

## Model 10
```{r}
mod2 <- lmer(lnRR_4WAP ~ ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit)
```

## Model 11 (lnrr harvest ~ lnrr mid)

```{r}
mod5a <- lmer(lnRR_4WAP ~ ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc || sy), data = final_datay)
```

# Model 11.5 (lnrr harvest ~ ccbm)

Per previous suggestions not doing both weed density timings 

```{r}
mod11_5 <- lmer(lnRR_4WAP ~ ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc || sy), data = final_datay)
mod11_5a <- lmer(lnRR_4WAP ~ ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay)
anova(mod11_5, mod11_5a) # correlated is way better!
summary(mod11_5a)
anova(mod11_5a)
```

## Model 12 (soybean yield ~ lnrr end)

```{r}
mod9a <- lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_4WAP + ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay)
anova(mod9a) 
mod9b <- lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_4WAP +  ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay)
mod9c <- lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_4WAP +  ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc || sy), data = final_datay)

anova(mod9b, mod9c)
```

P-value >0.05 as such, best model is the most parsimonious.



```{r   fig.width = 5, fig.height = 5}
residuals <- resid(mod9c)
hist(residuals, breaks = 20, main = "Histogram of Residuals")
ggplot(data.frame(eta = predict(mod9c, type="link"), pearson = residuals(mod9c, type = "pearson")),
    aes(x = eta,y = pearson)) +
    geom_point() +
    theme_bw()
qqnorm(residuals)
qqline(residuals, col="red")
infIndexPlot(mod9c, vars = "Cook")
dotplot(ranef(mod9c))
```

```{r}
Q1 <- quantile(residuals, 0.25)
Q3 <- quantile(residuals, 0.75)
IQR <- Q3 - Q1
lower_bound <- Q1 - 1.5 * IQR
upper_bound <- Q3 + 1.5 * IQR
outliers <- which(residuals < lower_bound | residuals > upper_bound)

final_datay <- final_datay[-outliers, ]
```

```{r}
mod9c <- lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_4WAP +  ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc || sy), data = final_datay)
residuals <- resid(mod9c)
hist(residuals, breaks = 20, main = "Histogram of Residuals")
ggplot(data.frame(eta = predict(mod9c, type="link"), pearson = residuals(mod9c, type = "pearson")),
    aes(x = eta,y = pearson)) +
    geom_point() +
    theme_bw()
qqnorm(residuals)
qqline(residuals, col="red")
infIndexPlot(mod9c, vars = "Cook")
dotplot(ranef(mod9c))
```




### PSEM

Starting-- most basic, no mid-season density


```{r}
psemDensity2 <- psem(
  lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_4WAP + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(lnRR_4WAP ~ ccbm_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(ccbm_sc ~ DPP_sc + (DPP_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit)
)

dSep(psemDensity2, .progressBar = FALSE)
# 3 p values v small
fisherC(psemDensity2)

summary(psemDensity2)
```



```{r}
psemDensity3 <- psem(
  lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_4WAP + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(lnRR_4WAP ~ ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(ccbm_sc ~ DPP_sc + (DPP_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit)
)

dSep(psemDensity3, .progressBar = FALSE)
# still small p value
fisherC(psemDensity3)

summary(psemDensity3)
```


```{r}
psemDensity4 <- psem(
  lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_4WAP + ccbm_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(lnRR_4WAP ~ ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(ccbm_sc ~ DPP_sc + (DPP_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit)
)

dSep(psemDensity4, .progressBar = FALSE)
# still small p value
fisherC(psemDensity4)

summary(psemDensity4)
```


```{r}
psemDensity5 <- psem(
  lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_4WAP + ccbm_sc + (ccbm_sc || sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(lnRR_4WAP ~ ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(ccbm_sc ~ DPP_sc + (DPP_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit)
)

dSep(psemDensity5, .progressBar = FALSE)
# still small p value
fisherC(psemDensity5)

summary(psemDensity5)
```


```{r}
psemDensity6 <- psem(
  lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_4WAP + ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc || sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(lnRR_4WAP ~ ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit),
  lmer(ccbm_sc ~ DPP_sc + (DPP_sc | sy), data = final_datay, na.action = na.omit)
)

dSep(psemDensity6, .progressBar = FALSE)
# saturated
fisherC(psemDensity6)
# saturated
summary(psemDensity6)
```


### Figures





```{r}
mod9b <- lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_4WAP +  ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay)


valid_sy <- unique(mod9c@frame$sy) #just site years in mod2

newdat <- expand.grid(
  DPP_sc = seq(min(final_datay$DPP_sc, na.rm = TRUE),
                max(final_datay$DPP_sc, na.rm = TRUE),
                length.out = 100),
  ccbm_sc = mean(final_datay$ccbm_sc, na.rm = TRUE),
  lnRR_4WAP = mean(final_datay$lnRR_4WAP, na.rm = TRUE), 
  sy = valid_sy
)
newdat$pred_sy <- predict(mod9b, newdata = newdat, re.form = NULL)

newdat$pred_pop <- predict(mod9b, newdata = newdat, re.form = NA)

pred_int2 <- predictInterval(
  mod9b,
  newdata = newdat,
  level = 0.95, #seems fine
  n.sims = 1000, #runs fast?? good enough
  stat = "mean",
  include.resid.var = FALSE,
  which = "fixed"  # we only want the confidence interval for the population line not the site year lines
)

newdat$fit   <- pred_int2$fit
newdat$lwr   <- pred_int2$lwr
newdat$upr   <- pred_int2$upr

figure5c <- ggplot() +
  # Site-year lines (colored)
  geom_line(data = newdat,
            aes(x = DPP_sc, y = pred_sy, color = sy),
            size = 0.75, alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_line(data = newdat,
            aes(x = DPP_sc, y = pred_pop),
            color = "black", size = 1.5) +
  geom_ribbon(data = newdat,
            aes(x = DPP_sc, ymin = lwr, ymax = upr),
            fill = "gray30", alpha = 0.4) +
  labs(x = "Termination timing",
       y = "Soybean Yield", 
       color = "Site-year") + 
  theme_light () + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#7294D4", "#7294D4",  #delaware
                                "#FAD510", "#FAD510", #illinois
                                "#C52E19",  #louisiana
                                "#046C9A", #maryland
                                "#F3DF6C", #minnesota
                                "#FBA72A", "#FBA72A", #missouri
                                "#CEAB07", "#CEAB07", "#CEAB07",#nebraska
                                
                                "#85D4E3", "#85D4E3", "#85D4E3")) + #virginia
  theme(
       axis.text.x = element_text(size=10), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=10), 
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=10),
       legend.position = "none",
       legend.spacing.x = unit(10, "pt"),
       legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
       legend.title = element_text(size = 9),
       legend.key.size = unit(0.5, "cm"),
       legend.key.spacing.y = unit(0, "pt"),
       legend.box.margin = margin(-5, -5, -5, -5))+
  guides(col = guide_legend(nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE))


figure5c

ggsave("figure5termtiming.png", width = 3, height = 2.5, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```


```{r}
mod9b <- lmer(lnyield ~ lnRR_harvest +  ccbm_sc + DPP_sc + (ccbm_sc | sy), data = final_datay)


valid_sy <- unique(mod9c@frame$sy) #just site years in mod2

newdat <- expand.grid(
  lnRR_harvest = seq(min(final_datay$lnRR_harvest, na.rm = TRUE),
                max(final_datay$lnRR_harvest, na.rm = TRUE),
                length.out = 100),
  DPP_sc = mean(final_datay$DPP_sc, na.rm = TRUE),
  ccbm_sc = mean(final_datay$ccbm_sc, na.rm = TRUE), 
  sy = valid_sy
)
newdat$pred_sy <- predict(mod9b, newdata = newdat, re.form = NULL)

newdat$pred_pop <- predict(mod9b, newdata = newdat, re.form = NA)

pred_int2 <- predictInterval(
  mod9b,
  newdata = newdat,
  level = 0.95, #seems fine
  n.sims = 1000, #runs fast?? good enough
  stat = "mean",
  include.resid.var = FALSE,
  which = "fixed"  # we only want the confidence interval for the population line not the site year lines
)

newdat$fit   <- pred_int2$fit
newdat$lwr   <- pred_int2$lwr
newdat$upr   <- pred_int2$upr

figure5d <- ggplot() +
  # Site-year lines (colored)
  geom_line(data = newdat,
            aes(x = lnRR_harvest, y = pred_sy, color = sy),
            size = 0.75, alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_line(data = newdat,
            aes(x = lnRR_harvest, y = pred_pop),
            color = "black", size = 1.5) +
  geom_ribbon(data = newdat,
            aes(x = lnRR_harvest, ymin = lwr, ymax = upr),
            fill = "gray30", alpha = 0.4) +
  labs(x = "lnRR_harvest",
       y = "Soybean Yield (natural logarithmically transformed)", 
       color = "Site-year") + 
  theme_light () + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#7294D4", "#7294D4", "#7294D4", "#7294D4", #delaware
                                "#FAD510", "#FAD510", "#FAD510", #illinois
                                "#C52E19",  #louisiana
                                "#046C9A", "#046C9A", "#046C9A", #maryland
                                "#F3DF6C", "#F3DF6C", "#F3DF6C", "#F3DF6C", #minnesota
                                "#FBA72A", "#FBA72A", "#FBA72A", #missouri
                                "#CEAB07", "#CEAB07", "#CEAB07", "#CEAB07",#nebraska
                                "#972D15", #texas
                                "#85D4E3", "#85D4E3", "#85D4E3")) + #virginia
 
   
  theme(
       axis.text.x = element_text(size=10), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=10), 
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=10),
        legend.position = "none")

figure5d

#work out some save details 
#ggsave("figure1bottom.png", width = 6, height = 2.5, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```
